Our Story

Where Tradition Meets Flavour

Isar Ji Café brings the warmth of an authentic North Indian dhaba right to the heart of Bangalore. Decked in terracotta hues and adorned with tribal Warli art, every corner breathes rustic charm.

We proudly serve only pure Jain and Satvik food — no onion, no garlic — so every soul can feast without compromise. From sizzling chaats to hearty bhatura, each dish is crafted with devotion.

Our kulhad chai, mango lassi, and seasonal specials make every visit a memory worth carrying home.

🌿 Jain Friendly 🥛 Pure Veg 🏺 Dhaba Style 🍵 Kulhad Chai 🚗 Parking Available 🤝 Catering
Slow-cooked dal served with freshly baked tandoori naan
